channel.title: +Nandy Rajarshi on आगमे शैवे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Nandy Rajarshi on आगमे शैवे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: dIxA
item.description: Source: TW Few things about diksa which most do not know and this ignorance is misused by some to scare people. tantra recommendations In tantra the most recommended diksha is abhiseka diksha (shakta-pUrNa-krama etc etc). This is mandatory when doing karmakanda of Mahavidya. Why? Because this diksa is an elaborate puja asking protection and aid as well for the upasaka. Most of the small orgs or people selling diksas have no idea, nor the adhikara to give a shaktabhiseka diksa .
